title: calophyllum garcinioides
intro: Calophyllum garcinioides, also known as the yellow beech or Garcinia beech, is a species of tree in the family Calophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum garcinioides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimalarial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
